TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Jianshi, title = Jianshi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jianshi} }

S.FORM: Jianshi Jianshi a sakuwan ku Hsinchu. kumud nu kalesakan, 522.98 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 397.38 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 114.53 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 9,456 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,825 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 8,569 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 91% (Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u Tayal ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Jianshi mala 7 a cuwen atu 49 ku niyazu'. kina 49 a niyazu'sa, Mkzihing , Mkmatuy , Piling , Paqiy , Yutak , Kbaqeh , Cinbulan , Kuxan , Ageq , Micista , Mknahuy , Mksuzing , Mklapay , Lkuxan , Hbun-Rangay , Mkslaq , Qwayux , Hbun-Qramay , Pololan , Uraw , Libu , Llyung , Ulay , Batul , Mami , Quri , Plmwan , Tayax , Ponaway , Smangus , Thyakan , Smangus , Cinsbu , Yuluw , Gowryu , Rahaw , Cyocuy , Hbun kramay , Hbun-tunan , Kin lwan , Qolu , Qyuws , Hbun-lesa , Metapay , M'yutak , Mrmurak , Spwan , Melukux , Metuiy . kakitidaan kitidaan Jianshi "Taywan ngayngay a kamu hay-lu a ngalngal, ziamňč shagňô hiongňč, Atayal, Nahuy, idai Taywan Sin-cuku sakawaliyan timulan, atu Wufeng malecad tu Sin-cuku a san-ti' niyadu', ahebal nu ka kitidaan han 527.5795 pin-fan-kun-li, u Sin-cuku satabakiay saahebalay nu sin-cen-ciu . labu nu talakaw han makaala tu tusa a lasubu (200) tusa atu tusa a malebut (2000) kun-ce, angangan nu muenengay u Taywan yincumin a binacadan "Atayal a binacadan", atu ngayngay a tademaw. ilabu nu niyadu' talakaw han makaal tu cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) katukuh tulu a malebut (3000) a kun-ce kilangkilangan nami. nu amisan u sasinganganay nu santi a niyadu'. ni kasinganganan namakayda i niyadu'ay tu Naluo sauwac , Ciw-le sawac kapulungan malikid nu nanum masamutidengay nu madicemay a tebue' nu ba'tu. . haylu a ngalngal nu angayangay, singangan nacu tu hay-lu-pin, nu layak a bninacadan nu ngayngay a sakacacay nu kakamuwan, tadaangangan nuheni i tida mapahelak i Cung-kuo kuan-tung-sen san-wi-se , atu Taywan a ngayngayan a niyadu'. Jianshi amisan mitulin tu kun-si-cen , wali amis sibiyaw tu Taw-yun-se fu-sinciu , waliyan sibiyaw tu I-lansen Ta-tun niyadu' , timulan mitulin tu Miw-li-kin Tay-an niyadu' , nutipan sibiyaw tu Wu-eng , hen-san niyadu' . i nabuyu' idaw ku nika babenis tu nuayawan a buyu', nikudan a buhu' nu tusaay a kakitidaan, nuayawan a buyu' idaw ku Sin-le' , Cia-le' , Cin-pin , I'-sin atu Ma-hua-u lima a niyadu'an, nikudan a buyu' idaw ku I'-fun atu Siw-lun tusa a niyadu'an, naw Atayal a tadaniyadu'an, idaw ku Takicin sauwac atu Sa-ke-ya sauwac . Ta-ke'-cin sauwac nu tukusay a nanum sabataday nu misilsilay a nanum nu sabataday nu anganganan a nanum, kalinatuan u Pin-tan buyu' nu amisan, Sake'-ya-cin sauwac i tida i Tapa'-cin abuyu'an nu amisan, atu Ta-ke'ya-cin sauwac misilsilay katukuh i Siw-lun malalitemuh mala Ma-like'-wan sauwac , u luma'nu lunung atu se-pan a butingan. Ce-yu buyu' Ce-yu buyu' , idawaca ku ngangan u I'-luo-fu buyu' itida i Taywan Tay-cun-se'hepin kitidaan lisan-li atu Sin-cu-kin Jianshi siw-luon a niyadu'an nu laad, u Tay-wan sasinganganay a buyu', u Tay-wan a cacay a lasubu nu buyu'an, silesilen a singangan han sakalima a bataan idaw ku tusa (52) a buyu'. Ce-yu buyu' talakaw han tulu a malebut tulu a lasubu idaw ku tulu (3303) a kun-ce, tuduh han idaw ku tulu a malecaday nu tuluay a kalimucu' a sasulitan, u Siy-san a babuyu'an , Wulin nu sepat a bangacalay nu buyu'an,tungduh nu buyu nutipan a lutuklutukan idaw ku Sin-ta-ce , Ya-ma-ce atu Pin-tan-ce nu pinaay a talakaway nu buyu' a sasawacan, nikasinganganan. pangangan han nu Atayal u "Tamarappu" ngalngal misegitu Tama-lapu-san , Zipun nipibelihan u I'-luo-fu buyu' . Ceyu-buyu' nutipan han u Pin-tan buyu' , waliyan mitulin tu Taw-san , Se-lun buyu' atu Ke'-la-ya buyu' . Sia-ke'-luo a kawaw, nika sikawaw itini i Zipunan nu Taywan a yincumin nu kalepacawan anika adaan nu kawaw, kasikawawan i tini i Sin-cuku Jianshi . sakasikawaw u Taywan Cun-du cuo-ciu-cin-cuo-matay itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan (1910) katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (1914) a mihcaan mitaneng tu limaay a mihcaan ni kasikiyakuwan a kawaw, milihida tu Taywan amisan nu buyu' a yincumin kinapina micumud misawacu, mialaw tu kuwan a tutuudan atu mikuwan kelec nu kakawaw atu a pakalaluwayluway amisa lihalay muculil mipenec misanai' tu tademaw. . kalingesantu nu niyadu'ay a yincumin, macunus aca nu niyaniyadu'ay anikasasuada nu niyadu'ay tu malumanay a linges atu kainaian nu laheci a balucu', sisa linga tu satu idaw kuni kasasuadaan a malalebu. Jianshi u Sin-cu satabakiay a ahebalay nu lala' a niyadu'an, u kapulungan nu yincumin a niyadu' nu kupulungan a kakitidaan, Jianshi sakanamuhan bangcalay nu aadihan nu kilakilangan, kaydaan muculil bangcal sa adihen. milakuyt tu kacinlawan nu Na-wan , maka tukuh tu itini i Jianshi . makatukuh i Jianshi , kanca milakalak tu bangcal nu pe-ciw nu mapacacuyan a kayakay, dumaan a tapiingan nu mapacacuyan a kayakay han idaw ku tatanaman tu Hunpeciw kafa tatanaman, mutaydaay a tademaw kanca musaluimeng. saka enem a balubaluan mahida miculimekay i kilakilangan nu buyubuyu'an, langdawsa adihen ku balubaluan, tayniay nu mukanay a tademaw, kanca miadih tu bangcal nu pala, mahida u ahemaw ku udipudipan numita. Hun-cin-wi u Jianshi sakasingangan nu aidangan, picidekan un kulitkulitan a luma', madateng kita tu nu buyubuyu'an a nalimaan nu bangcal, nu caaya kaw cinlaway a lihalayan nu kakitidaan idaw ku nikulitan atu kasi icelangan nu demiad. talakaw makaala tu cacay a malebut tusa a lasubu (1200) a kun-ce u tapukuwan ku tataydaan a midang, makatukuh tu sakatapabaw i adawangan, tada maadih tu ku bangcal a buyubuyu'an atu masa babuybabuya a laden mahida i matamataan numita a madateng. Sin-cu baluhay aaidangan Jianshi balaud nisilesilan tu ba'tu a tapukuwan nu caculilan, Sin-cu nu masacacayay a galasu taneng mutideng ini masabahelay itida i sawuac nu galasu a enalan, miadih ku Na-luo sauwac tunika sedaysa nu cascas atu bangcal nu sauwac a aadihan, madayuman katukuh han nu kilangkilangan a caculilan u sakapahay nu tataydaan a muculil.

ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, mkzińßiŇč , mkmatuj , pir~…ĺiŇč , pa*ij , jutak , kba*…ôńß , ¶inbur~…ĺan , ku*an , ag…ô* , mi ¶ista , mknańßuj , mksuziŇč , mkr~…ĺapaj , r~…ĺku*an , "tamarappu" Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ mis…ôgitu tama-r~…ĺapu-san , zipun nipib…ôr~…ĺińßan u i Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-fu buju Ē~ ° . ¶…ôu-buju Ē~ ° nutipan ńßan u pin-tan buju Ē~ ° , war~…ĺijan mitur~…ĺin tu taw-san , sin- ¶uku *iansńßi . sakasikawaw u tajwan ¶un-du ¶uo- ¶iu- ¶in- ¶uo-mataj itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan (****) katukuńß i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan mitan…ôŇč tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß ¶aan ni kasikijakuwan a kawaw, mir~…ĺińßida tu tajwan amisan nu buju Ē~ ° a jin ¶umin kinapina mi ¶umud misawa ¶u, miar~…ĺaw tu kuwan a tutuudan atu mikuwan k…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ nu kakawaw atu a pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwajr~…ĺuwaj amisa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ mip…ôn…ô ¶ misanai Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw. . kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsantu nu nijadu Ē~ °aj a jin ¶umin, ma ¶unus a ¶a nu nijanijadu Ē~ °aj anikasasuada nu nijadu Ē~ °aj tu mar~…ĺumanaj a r~…ĺiŇč…ôs atu kainaian nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sisa r~…ĺiŇča tu satu idaw kuni kasasuadaan a mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu. *iansńßi u sin- ¶u satabakiaj a ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a nijadu Ē~ °an, u kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu jin ¶umin a nijadu Ē~ ° nu kupur~…ĺuŇčan a kakitidaan, *iansńßi sakanamuńßan baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu aadińßan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, kajdaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa adińß…ôn. mir~…ĺakujt tu ka ¶inr~…ĺawan nu na-wan , maka tukuńß tu itini i *iansńßi . makatukuńß i *iansńßi , kan ¶a mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu p…ô- ¶iw nu mapa ¶a ¶ujan a kajakaj, dumaan a tapiiŇčan nu mapa ¶a ¶ujan a kajakaj ńßan idaw ku tatanaman tu ńßunp…ô ¶iw kafa tatanaman, mutajdaaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a musar~…ĺuim…ôŇč. saka …ôn…ôm a bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan mańßida mi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkaj i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nu bujubuju Ē~ °an, r~…ĺaŇčdawsa adińß…ôn ku bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan, tajniaj nu mukanaj a tad…ômaw, kan ¶a miadińß tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu par~…ĺa, mańßida u ańß…ômaw ku udipudipan numita. ńßun- ¶in-wi u *iansńßi sakasiŇčaŇčan nu aidaŇčan, pi ¶id…ôkan un kur~…ĺitkur~…ĺitan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, madat…ôŇč kita tu nu bujubuju Ē~ °an a nar~…ĺimaan nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ, nu ¶aaja kaw ¶inr~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajan nu kakitidaan idaw ku nikur~…ĺitan atu kasi i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nu d…ômiad. tar~…ĺakaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa a r~…ĺasubu (****) a kun- ¶…ô u tapukuwan ku tatajdaan a midaŇč, makatukuńß tu sakatapabaw i adawaŇčan, tada maadińß tu ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ a bujubuju Ē~ °an atu masa babujbabuja a r~…ĺad…ôn mańßida i matamataan numita a madat…ôŇč. sin- ¶u bar~…ĺuńßaj aaidaŇčan *iansńßi bar~…ĺaud nisir~…ĺ…ôsir~…ĺan tu ba Ē~ °tu a tapukuwan nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sin- ¶u nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj a gar~…ĺasu tan…ôŇč mutid…ôŇč ini masabańß…ôr~…ĺaj itida i sawua ¶ nu gar~…ĺasu a …ônar~…ĺan, miadińß ku na-r~…ĺuo sauwa ¶ tunika s…ôdajsa nu ¶as ¶as atu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ a aadińßan, madajuman katukuńß ńßan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan u sakapańßaj nu tatajdaan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ.
S.FORM: Jianshi Jianshi a sakuwan ku Hsinchu. kumud nu kalesakan, 522.98 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 397.38 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 114.53 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 9,456 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,825 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 8,569 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 91% (Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u Tayal ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Jianshi mala 7 a cuwen atu 49 ku niyazu'. kina 49 a niyazu'sa, Mkzihing , Mkmatuy , Piling , Paqiy , Yutak , Kbaqeh , Cinbulan , Kuxan , Ageq , Micista , Mknahuy , Mksuzing , Mklapay , Lkuxan , Hbun-Rangay , Mkslaq , Qwayux , Hbun-Qramay , Pololan , Uraw , Libu , Llyung , Ulay , Batul , Mami , Quri , Plmwan , Tayax , Ponaway , Smangus , Thyakan , Smangus , Cinsbu , Yuluw , Gowryu , Rahaw , Cyocuy , Hbun kramay , Hbun-tunan , Kin lwan , Qolu , Qyuws , Hbun-lesa , Metapay , M'yutak , Mrmurak , Spwan , Melukux , Metuiy . kakitidaan kitidaan Jianshi "Taywan ngayngay a kamu hay-lu a ngalngal, ziamňč shagňô hiongňč, Atayal, Nahuy, idai Taywan Sin-cuku sakawaliyan timulan, atu Wufeng malecad tu Sin-cuku a san-ti' niyadu', ahebal nu ka kitidaan han 527.5795 pin-fan-kun-li, u Sin-cuku satabakiay saahebalay nu sin-cen-ciu . labu nu talakaw han makaala tu tusa a lasubu (200) tusa atu tusa a malebut (2000) kun-ce, angangan nu muenengay u Taywan yincumin a binacadan "Atayal a binacadan", atu ngayngay a tademaw. ilabu nu niyadu' talakaw han makaal tu cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) katukuh tulu a malebut (3000) a kun-ce kilangkilangan nami. nu amisan u sasinganganay nu santi a niyadu'. ni kasinganganan namakayda i niyadu'ay tu Naluo sauwac , Ciw-le sawac kapulungan malikid nu nanum masamutidengay nu madicemay a tebue' nu ba'tu. . haylu a ngalngal nu angayangay, singangan nacu tu hay-lu-pin, nu layak a bninacadan nu ngayngay a sakacacay nu kakamuwan, tadaangangan nuheni i tida mapahelak i Cung-kuo kuan-tung-sen san-wi-se , atu Taywan a ngayngayan a niyadu'. Jianshi amisan mitulin tu kun-si-cen , wali amis sibiyaw tu Taw-yun-se fu-sinciu , waliyan sibiyaw tu I-lansen Ta-tun niyadu' , timulan mitulin tu Miw-li-kin Tay-an niyadu' , nutipan sibiyaw tu Wu-eng , hen-san niyadu' . i nabuyu' idaw ku nika babenis tu nuayawan a buyu', nikudan a buhu' nu tusaay a kakitidaan, nuayawan a buyu' idaw ku Sin-le' , Cia-le' , Cin-pin , I'-sin atu Ma-hua-u lima a niyadu'an, nikudan a buyu' idaw ku I'-fun atu Siw-lun tusa a niyadu'an, naw Atayal a tadaniyadu'an, idaw ku Takicin sauwac atu Sa-ke-ya sauwac . Ta-ke'-cin sauwac nu tukusay a nanum sabataday nu misilsilay a nanum nu sabataday nu anganganan a nanum, kalinatuan u Pin-tan buyu' nu amisan, Sake'-ya-cin sauwac i tida i Tapa'-cin abuyu'an nu amisan, atu Ta-ke'ya-cin sauwac misilsilay katukuh i Siw-lun malalitemuh mala Ma-like'-wan sauwac , u luma'nu lunung atu se-pan a butingan. Ce-yu buyu' Ce-yu buyu' , idawaca ku ngangan u I'-luo-fu buyu' itida i Taywan Tay-cun-se'hepin kitidaan lisan-li atu Sin-cu-kin Jianshi siw-luon a niyadu'an nu laad, u Tay-wan sasinganganay a buyu', u Tay-wan a cacay a lasubu nu buyu'an, silesilen a singangan han sakalima a bataan idaw ku tusa (52) a buyu'. Ce-yu buyu' talakaw han tulu a malebut tulu a lasubu idaw ku tulu (3303) a kun-ce, tuduh han idaw ku tulu a malecaday nu tuluay a kalimucu' a sasulitan, u Siy-san a babuyu'an , Wulin nu sepat a bangacalay nu buyu'an,tungduh nu buyu nutipan a lutuklutukan idaw ku Sin-ta-ce , Ya-ma-ce atu Pin-tan-ce nu pinaay a talakaway nu buyu' a sasawacan, nikasinganganan. pangangan han nu Atayal u "Tamarappu" ngalngal misegitu Tama-lapu-san , Zipun nipibelihan u I'-luo-fu buyu' . Ceyu-buyu' nutipan han u Pin-tan buyu' , waliyan mitulin tu Taw-san , Se-lun buyu' atu Ke'-la-ya buyu' . Sia-ke'-luo a kawaw, nika sikawaw itini i Zipunan nu Taywan a yincumin nu kalepacawan anika adaan nu kawaw, kasikawawan i tini i Sin-cuku Jianshi . sakasikawaw u Taywan Cun-du cuo-ciu-cin-cuo-matay itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan (1910) katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (1914) a mihcaan mitaneng tu limaay a mihcaan ni kasikiyakuwan a kawaw, milihida tu Taywan amisan nu buyu' a yincumin kinapina micumud misawacu, mialaw tu kuwan a tutuudan atu mikuwan kelec nu kakawaw atu a pakalaluwayluway amisa lihalay muculil mipenec misanai' tu tademaw. . kalingesantu nu niyadu'ay a yincumin, macunus aca nu niyaniyadu'ay anikasasuada nu niyadu'ay tu malumanay a linges atu kainaian nu laheci a balucu', sisa linga tu satu idaw kuni kasasuadaan a malalebu. Jianshi u Sin-cu satabakiay a ahebalay nu lala' a niyadu'an, u kapulungan nu yincumin a niyadu' nu kupulungan a kakitidaan, Jianshi sakanamuhan bangcalay nu aadihan nu kilakilangan, kaydaan muculil bangcal sa adihen. milakuyt tu kacinlawan nu Na-wan , maka tukuh tu itini i Jianshi . makatukuh i Jianshi , kanca milakalak tu bangcal nu pe-ciw nu mapacacuyan a kayakay, dumaan a tapiingan nu mapacacuyan a kayakay han idaw ku tatanaman tu Hunpeciw kafa tatanaman, mutaydaay a tademaw kanca musaluimeng. saka enem a balubaluan mahida miculimekay i kilakilangan nu buyubuyu'an, langdawsa adihen ku balubaluan, tayniay nu mukanay a tademaw, kanca miadih tu bangcal nu pala, mahida u ahemaw ku udipudipan numita. Hun-cin-wi u Jianshi sakasingangan nu aidangan, picidekan un kulitkulitan a luma', madateng kita tu nu buyubuyu'an a nalimaan nu bangcal, nu caaya kaw cinlaway a lihalayan nu kakitidaan idaw ku nikulitan atu kasi icelangan nu demiad. talakaw makaala tu cacay a malebut tusa a lasubu (1200) a kun-ce u tapukuwan ku tataydaan a midang, makatukuh tu sakatapabaw i adawangan, tada maadih tu ku bangcal a buyubuyu'an atu masa babuybabuya a laden mahida i matamataan numita a madateng. Sin-cu baluhay aaidangan Jianshi balaud nisilesilan tu ba'tu a tapukuwan nu caculilan, Sin-cu nu masacacayay a galasu taneng mutideng ini masabahelay itida i sawuac nu galasu a enalan, miadih ku Na-luo sauwac tunika sedaysa nu cascas atu bangcal nu sauwac a aadihan, madayuman katukuh han nu kilangkilangan a caculilan u sakapahay nu tataydaan a muculil.
S.PHON: *iansńßi *iansńßi a sakuwan ku ńßsin ¶ńßu. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti ***.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, mkzińßiŇč , mkmatuj , pir~…ĺiŇč , pa*ij , jutak , kba*…ôńß , ¶inbur~…ĺan , ku*an , ag…ô* , mi ¶ista , mknańßuj , mksuziŇč , mkr~…ĺapaj , r~…ĺku*an , ¶ar~…ĺaj nu aadińßan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, kajdaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa adińß…ôn. mir~…ĺakujt tu ka ¶inr~…ĺawan nu na-wan , maka tukuńß tu itini i *iansńßi . makatukuńß i *iansńßi , kan ¶a mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu p…ô- ¶iw nu mapa ¶a ¶ujan a kajakaj, dumaan a tapiiŇčan nu mapa ¶a ¶ujan a kajakaj ńßan idaw ku tatanaman tu ńßunp…ô ¶iw kafa tatanaman, mutajdaaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a musar~…ĺuim…ôŇč. saka …ôn…ôm a bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan mańßida mi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkaj i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nu bujubuju Ē~ °an, r~…ĺaŇčdawsa adińß…ôn ku bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan, tajniaj nu mukanaj a tad…ômaw, kan ¶a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa a r~…ĺasubu (****) a kun- ¶…ô u tapukuwan ku tatajdaan a midaŇč, makatukuńß tu sakatapabaw i adawaŇčan, tada maadińß tu ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ a bujubuju Ē~ °an atu masa babujbabuja a r~…ĺad…ôn mańßida i matamataan numita a madat…ôŇč. sin- ¶u bar~…ĺuńßaj aaidaŇčan *iansńßi bar~…ĺaud nisir~…ĺ…ôsir~…ĺan tu ba Ē~ °tu a tapukuwan nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sin- ¶u nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj a gar~…ĺasu tan…ôŇč mutid…ôŇč ini masabańß…ôr~…ĺaj itida i sawua ¶ nu gar~…ĺasu a …ônar~…ĺan, miadińß ku na-r~…ĺuo sauwa ¶ tunika s…ôdajsa nu ¶as ¶as atu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ a aadińßan, madajuman katukuńß ńßan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan u sakapańßaj nu tatajdaan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ.
